subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is a servant whom Thou didst nurture in the cradle of Thy tender care and the bosom of Thy bounty until he was raised beneath the shade of Thy favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان هذا عبد ربیته فی حضن عنایتک و حجر موهبتک حتی نشاء فی ظل الطافک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation
